# Merapi Volcaniclastic

**Summary**: Sedimentary and pyroclastic materials from the Merapi volcano.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] analyzed Merapi volcaniclastics across different environments.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Fluvial, coastal, and aeolian systems

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Composition: 50% glass, 30% plagioclase, 10% hornblende, 6% quartz, 4% pyroxene. ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 32]])
